name: reliability-distributions
title: Incident Response & Reliability Distributions
subtitle: resolution spread, response-time density, latency ridges & incident swarm
description: The distribution-chart quartet: a quartile box per team, a kernel-density violin per severity, horizontally-stacked density ridges per service, and an individual-point swarm per severity. These four forms all group many raw rows per category to show real spread rather than a single summary number — the last chart types needed to cover the full gallery.

dataAccesses.name: ReliabilityKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(resolution_hrs),1) AS resolution_hrs, ROUND(AVG(sla_compliance_pct),1) AS sla_compliance_pct, SUM(open_incident_count) AS open_incident_count, ROUND(AVG(mtta_min),1) AS mtta_min FROM v_incident_master

dataAccesses.name: TeamResolutionSpread
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT t.team_tier AS team_tier, i.resolution_hrs AS resolution_hrs FROM v_incident_resolution i JOIN dim_team t ON i.team_id = t.id

dataAccesses.name: SeverityResponseDensity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT s.severity_type AS severity_type, i.response_min AS response_min FROM v_incident_response i JOIN dim_severity s ON i.severity_id = s.id

dataAccesses.name: SeverityDurationSwarm
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT s.severity_type AS severity_type, i.duration_min AS duration_min FROM v_incident_duration i JOIN dim_severity s ON i.severity_id = s.id

dataAccesses.name: ServiceLatencyRidges
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sv.service_tier AS service_tier, l.latency_ms AS latency_ms FROM v_service_latency l JOIN dim_service sv ON l.service_id = sv.id

kpis.label: Avg Resolution Time
kpis.info: Mean hours from incident open to resolution across all teams.

kpis.label: SLA Compliance
kpis.info: Share of incidents resolved within their SLA window.

kpis.label: Open Incidents
kpis.info: Incidents currently open across all severities.

kpis.label: Mean Time to Acknowledge
kpis.info: Average minutes from alert to first acknowledgement.

opts.content:
## Incident Response & Reliability Distributions
Four chart forms built for **spread, not just averages** — each groups many raw observations per category so you see the *shape* of the data, not one summary number.

- A quartile **box plot** of resolution time per team
- A **violin** (kernel-density) view of response time per severity
- A **swarm** of every individual incident's duration, jittered by severity
- **Ridgeline** density curves comparing latency across services

panels.title: Resolution Time by Team
panels.info: Q1/median/Q3 resolution hours per team, from every closed incident this quarter.

panels.title: Response-Time Density by Severity
panels.info: Full response-time distribution per severity tier — the violin's width shows how common each response time is.

panels.title: Incident Duration Swarm by Severity
panels.info: Every incident plotted individually and jittered within its severity strip — reveals clusters and outliers a summary chart would hide.

panels.title: Latency Distribution Ridges by Service
panels.info: Horizontally-stacked density ridges compare each service's latency distribution at a glance.
